State.Name: Berserk
State.Effect: Outgoing Martial/Thrown Projectile Weapon Attacks Advantaged; Incoming Attacks Advantaged; Expending 1 Mana Exits State

State.Name: Challenged
State.Effect: Enter Facing State Toward Challenger; Cannot Move Away From Challenger; Must Use Attacks At Challenger; Successfully Hitting the Challenger Exits State

State.Name: Controlled
State.Effect: Controlled Creature Must Use Actions Of Controller’s Choice; Resist Roll if attacking allies; Success Exits State

State.Name: Dancing
State.Effect: Expend All Run Within Current Space; Incoming Attacks Disadvantaged; Forces Viewing Creatures to Face Dancer; Limit 1 Dance Per Round; Exit After 1 Round

State.Name: Dazed
State.Effect: Cannot Cast Spells/Recite Chants/Evoke Evocations; -10 Attack Accuracy; -10 Dodge; Enter at negative Mana, otherwise Exit

State.Name: Death’s Door
State.Effect: Use Tools Free Action Only; Run lowered to 3; Death Prevention Roll end of round and on damage; Enter at 0 HP, otherwise Exit

State.Name: Demoralized
State.Effect: Take No Actions; Has Frightened Affliction; Enter at negative Morale; Exit if regaining at least 1 Morale

State.Name: Disguised
State.Effect: Unrecognizable as Yourself; Search Free Action can Reveal; Exit at Will

State.Name: Dodging
State.Effect: Double Defense gained from Dodge Skill; Exit after Duration or At Will

State.Name: Exhausted
State.Effect: Movement Halved; No Stamina Recovery; Enter at negative Stamina, otherwise Exit

State.Name: Facing
State.Effect: Face Fixed Direction; -5 Dodge from Behind; No Vision Behind

State.Name: Hidden
State.Effect: Unseen, Unheard; +5 Dodge on Attacked Foes; -5 Accuracy Incoming Attacks; Using Abilities Exits; Search Free Action can Reveal

State.Name: Grappled
State.Effect: Enter Facing State Toward Grappler; Grappler Can Move Grappled Creature; Shaking Off Free Action Exits State

State.Name: Invisible
State.Effect: Unseen; +5 Outgoing Accuracy; -5 Incoming Accuracy; Using Abilities or being Searched Exits State

State.Name: Levitation
State.Effect: Falls 1 Range per Round; Exited at Will or if inflicted with Snare Affliction

State.Name: Mounted
State.Effect: Actively Mounted by another; Can be forced to move via Lead Free Action; Exits if Shake Off Maneuver succeeds

State.Name: Mounting
State.Effect: Actively Mounting another; +5 Outgoing Accuracy; -5 Incoming Accuracy from Mounted Creature; Exits if Shake Off Maneuver succeeds

State.Name: Oiled
State.Effect: Immune to Grappled; Burning deals Double Fire Damage; Exits via Shake Off Maneuver

State.Name: Pinned
State.Effect: Prone; Cannot Execute Attack Maneuvers or Move; Exits on successful Shake Off Maneuver

State.Name: Prone
State.Effect: Movement Halved; -5 Dodge; -5 Outgoing Accuracy; Expend 1 Stamina to Stand and Exit

State.Name: Retaliation
State.Effect: Cannot Move; Incoming Melee Attacks trigger free Attack Reactions; Exit At Will or if moved

State.Name: Sleep
State.Effect: Enter Unconscious/Prone; Damage, Loud Noises, or Being Awoken Exits State

State.Name: Unconscious
State.Effect: Cannot Act or Move; Incoming Attacks Always Critically Hit; If not in Sleep State, exits after 1 hour

State.Name: Wet
State.Effect: Empowers incoming Lightning Damage; Removes and Prevents Burning Affliction

Affliction.Name: Blinded
Affliction.Effect: No Vision; -5 Accuracy; -5 Dodge; Cured by Eagle-Eyed Boon or Triage

Affliction.Name: Burning
Affliction.Effect: -5 HP Fire Damage per Round; -5 Accuracy; Cannot Enter Invisibility; Cured by Wet State or Shake Off

Affliction.Name: Frightened
Affliction.Effect: -5 Accuracy; Must move away from source; Cured by Bold Boon or Shake Off

Affliction.Name: Hemorrhaging
Affliction.Effect: -5 HP per Round; -5 HP per square of Run; Heal 1 HP to Cure; Cured by Triage

Affliction.Name: Immobilized
Affliction.Effect: No Movement; -10 Dodge; Fail Avoid Rolls; Cured by Charge or Haste Boons or Shake Off

Affliction.Name: Poisoned
Affliction.Effect: -5 Accuracy; -5 Skill Challenge Effectiveness; Cured by Triage

Affliction.Name: Silenced
Affliction.Effect: Cannot Use Verbal Abilities; Speechless; Cured by Amplified Boon or Triage

Affliction.Name: Slowed
Affliction.Effect: Run Halved; -5 Dodge; Attack Maneuver allows only 1 attack; Spells resolve after 1 Round; Chants after 2; Evocations after 3; Cured by Haste Boon

Affliction.Name: Snared
Affliction.Effect: Run Halved; -5 Dodge; Prevents Climb/Swim/Flight/Burrow; Cured by Charge or Haste Boons or Shake Off

Affliction.Name: Stop
Affliction.Effect: No Actions, Reactions, or Movement; Incoming Attacks Critically Hit; Cured by Alacrity or Haste Boons

Affliction.Name: Weakened
Affliction.Effect: Halves Attack Outcome; Halves Tactical Potency; Cured by Empower Boon

Boon.Name: Alacrity
Boon.Effect: Immediately take an additional Action; Removes Stop Affliction

Boon.Name: Amplified
Boon.Effect: Doubles Vocal Range; Doubles Song Radius; Immune to Silence

Boon.Name: Bold
Boon.Effect: Immune to Frightened Affliction; Cures Frightened Affliction

Boon.Name: Charge
Boon.Effect: Immediately regain full Run; Removes Snared and Immobilized Afflictions

Boon.Name: Eagle-Eyed
Boon.Effect: Doubles Vision Range; Enables Dark Vision; Prevents Blinded; Removes Blinded

Boon.Name: Empowered
Boon.Effect: Doubles Attack Outcome; Dispels Weakened Affliction

Boon.Name: Haste
Boon.Effect: Doubles Run; Additional Attack on Attack Maneuver; +5 Dodge (can exceed cap); Recite Instantly; Evoke in 1 Round; Dispels Stop/Slow

Boon.Name: Swiftness
Boon.Effect: Doubles Run; Cures Immobilized/Snared; Dispels Immobilized/Snared
